qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.title: QUIC 0-RTT replay accepted unconditionally in DoQ and DoH3 without anti-replay protection
qualifying_vulnerability_assessments.advisory_match_reason: The finding targets QUIC 0-RTT replay in core/dnsserver/server_quic.go and server_https3.go, where Allow0RTT is set without anti-replay validation. The advisory targets the DoH GET path in plugin/pkg/doh/doh.go where oversized dns= query parameters are base64-decoded and unpacked without size limits. Same repository but different vulnerable functions, different root cause (missing anti-replay vs. missing input size validation), and different vulnerability class (replay attack vs. uncontrolled resource consumption).

target_advisory_judgement.reason: No qualifying finding identifies the advisory-described vulnerable code/root cause. The advisory describes a DoS vulnerability in CoreDNS plugin/pkg/doh/doh.go where oversized DoH GET dns= query parameters are base64-decoded and DNS-message-unpacked without size limits. Finding 'quic-0rtt-replay' describes a QUIC 0-RTT replay vulnerability in different CoreDNS source files (server_quic.go, server_https3.go) with a different root cause (missing anti-replay vs. missing input size validation) and different vulnerable code path.
